en: What? It's off, okay? The whole thing's off. What are you talking about?
She never wanted me, she wanted Joey the whole time. Cameron, do you like the girl?
Yeah. Yeah, and is she worth all this trouble?
Well, I thought she was, but you know, I... Well, she is or she isn't. See, first of all,
Joey is not half the man you are. Secondly, don't let anyone ever make you feel like you
don't deserve what you want. Go for it!
